final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original styled food photography image of Korean cafe-style coffee and desserts, shot in a smartphone aesthetic suitable for Instagram, with no people, and hand-drawn white-pen annotation overlays on every visible element.

Style/medium: needs a Korean cafe Instagram aesthetic with hand-drawn white-pen annotation overlay — exact stylistic execution is yours; annotations must feel like 一笔書き (single-stroke), slightly uneven, rough white lines tracing object outlines, with arrows and dotted lines as visual guides; overall finish should feel like Instagram Stories meets magazine rough-notes
Composition: needs a flat-lay or slight overhead angle typical of smartphone cafe photography — exact framing is yours
Subject: must include coffee drink(s) and dessert/sweets as hero subjects; no people; every visible element must have a hand-drawn white outline annotation with a short Japanese handwritten comment attached
Scene/backdrop: must include a Korean cafe interior or cafe-table context
Lighting/mood: needs a soft, bright, trendy cafe atmosphere — exact light quality is yours
Color palette: needs a clean, fashionable cafe direction — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: needs the annotation layer to feel like white gel pen or white brush pen on top of the photo — exact line weight and texture are yours
Text (verbatim): must include handwritten-style Japanese annotation comments (7割ひらがな・3割かんじ) for each annotated element, following these rules:
  • 飲み物 → 味・温度・気持ち（例：「さっぱり〜」「やさしい甘さ♡」「ほっこり☁️」）
  • 食べ物 → 食感・おいしさ（例：「しっとり…」「さいこう」「ふわっとしてる」）
  • 空間 → 雰囲気（例：「ゆったり」「いい時間」）
  • 全体まとめ → 一言（例：「しあわせすぎた〜」「また来たい♡」）
  • Decorative accents: 蒸気・キラキラ・ハート・小さな顔文字 など、適度に添える
Constraints: must preserve "空白（negative space）" — annotations must not be overcrowded; hand-drawn lines must trace object outlines; arrows or dotted lines must connect text comments to their subjects; overall tone must feel like a personal diary / one-liner / emotional note
Avoid: people or human figures; overly digital or printed font appearance for annotations; cluttered or over-decorated layout
